TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Su-wa ËòáÁì¶ == Su-wa " Pei-ci kamu :Suva, kanatal a ngalnganl: ('suŒ≤a) u Pei-ci a suo-tu, u satabakiay a tukay nu Pei-ci. Su-wa itida i Wi-ti-subal a wali timulan, u teban nu kitidaan, tademaw makaala tu 77,366 ku tademaw. caywalpicpic mihcaan , Su-wa tatengan mala Pei-ci a suo-tu, katukuh i tusepcaypic mihcaan nipikisaan tu tademawan, Su-wa tademaw hakiya makaala tu 93,970 ku tademawan, pasu misitekeday nu inakaan a niyadu'an a tabakiay nu tukayan tademaw makaala tu 185,913 a tademawan. Su-wa atu malalitinay a Pei-ci La-mi, Na-si-nu atu C-suo-li a tukayan pulung nu tademaw hakiya makaala tu 330,000 nu tademawan, milakuuyt tu pulung nu kanatal malatulu nu cacayan a tademawan. ËòáÁì¶(ÊñêÊøüË™û:Suva,ÂúãÈöõÈü≥Ê®ô:('suŒ≤a)) . tawya, Su-wa u Pei-ci a cen-ce, sin-cen, sakaudip atu tatelungan nu lalangawan, micapi tu aydaay nu mihcaan madih tu ku nalimaan atu sapaadih tu katuuday ni miuingay, u Nan-tay-pin-yeng a sakaudip atu kalimulakan nu lalangawan, yadahay nu kanatalan a kusi, kanatal a kakulian atu aenengan nu tapan itida namin tina tukayan. Áï∂Ââç, . likisi Ê≠∑Âè≤ caywalnemwal mihcaan, Su-wa nuw adidi'ay henay a niyadu'an, Pa-u kuo-wan tumuk ci Say-lu.Ay-pey-ni-sa. Sa-kung-paw pahiya tu 5,000 pin-hun-kun-li a lala' sipabeli i hunbu itida i Aw-ta-li-ya a Puo-li-ni-si-ya kuse, sapaliyun tu nina kuse tu nakamuan nida tu sapatadah sa.caywalpicsipmihcaan, Pei-ci malaIng-kuo a kabulawan nu kitdaan. cawwalpicpic mihcaan kabulawan nu kitidaan pabalucu' tu suotu namaka Lei-u'-ka malimad taydan i Su-wa, Hun-cya kuncense a FE Pratt sakakaay i caywalpiclim mihcaan sipatudu' cinidaan tu pulung nu miditekay a tademaw han, itida i W. Stephen atu RW Stewart nipiedapan a misiki tu Su-wa a tukay nu kiyakuan. 1868Âπ¥, FE Pratt W. StephensÂíåRW Stewart . saan caysiwsepsiw mihcaan a " siciw huli a cudadan" Su-wa caysiwcaysep mihcaan maala tu sakalihalay nu kitidaan, katukuh i caysiwlimtu mihcaan, Su-wa pulungen nida ku Mu'-a-ni-kaw atu Sa-ma-pu-la niyadu'an, lala' misaahebal katukuh tu caylu pinhung-kunli, lala' nu kitidaan makaala tu cay pinhung-kunli. taway a mihcaan nu cacay a bataan bulad, Su-wa palatatengaay tu nipatuudan a tukayan, mala Pei-ci a sakacacay nu tukay. Su-wa itida i tusepseplu mihcaan sikawaw tu Nan-tay-ping-yeng piyunduan, uyni a nikasetsetan a kawaw nu sepat a bataan nu likisian a sakatulu nu sikawawan. mamisilud tina kawawan, Pei-ci itini i Cung-kuo sihu aniedapan tu kalisiwan makaala tu 1600 wang nu Amilika a kalisiw, miedap tu nipatideng tu baluhay a ayundean, ilabu nu tatelungan nu lumaan, ngangaduyan, kakadubaan, mammalian atu aadihan nu tademaw. ÊÝπÊìö1909Âπ¥ÁöÑ" . kitidaan Âú∞ÁêÜ Su-wa itida i Wi-ti-subal wali timu nu masadicumay a buyu' nu subalan a niyadu'an, itida i Law-ka-la-wan atu Su-wa minatuan nu laadan. amis atu tipan a buyu'an misuayaw tu wali timul nu balian, sisa tu mihcaan kapah ku nikasinanuman, tukay atu nisangaan tu luma' ayda atu nikabulawan nu sangan tu lamu'an milecad. amica ku Su-wa itida i hangbung nu subalan liklik mamin lawaan nu bayu', nika tepal nu dadipasan u sumanahay a kilakilangan, micapiay nu bayuan itida i sepat a bataan kun-li nu Tay-pin-yeng minatu. . deimad Ê∞£ÂÄô saan ku nikasasiduma nu dimiadan, Su-wa u kacaledesan nu siudaday a dimiadan. u puu' nu balian atu alahican nu masaliyutay nu balian, Su-wa caay kaw u ce'-taw a dimiadan. mihmihcaan idaw ku nanum nu Su-wa, inai' ku kelah nu puu'an, caay pisaba tu cacay a buladan nu nikahetikan tu udad nu 60 hawmi. Su-wa nikahetikan nu udad makaala tu 3,000 hawmi. saacakay han i pituay a buladan, nikahetikan tu udad 125 hawmi, malecad tu kacaledesan nu demiadan a tukayan, tu mihmihcaan mahida tu ku demiad nu Su-wa, satalakaway makaala tu 28¬∞C, sasabaay nu demiadan makaala tu 22¬∞C. 28¬∞C,Âπ≥ÂùáÊúÄ‰ΩéÊ∫´Â∫¶Á¥ÑÁÇ∫ 22¬∞C. Su-wa a nikaudadan mikikaka tu Nan-ti atu Wi-ti subal nitipan. sakamusa nu ayawan Ing-ku Pei-ci cungtu ci Ya-se.sin-men-cei-se sakamusa, caay henay pakaadih tu Su-wa-na nu mahidaay a udadan, caay kahedek ku nika udadan, sabaw tu cacay bulad katukuh tu lima bulad a nikaudadan u sayadahay, enem bulad katukuh cacay a bataan a bulad u sapi'ay a bulad caay ka hinaudad. . A-e-puo-te' kunyen ÈòøÁàæ‰ºØÁâπÂÖ¨Âúí Su-wa yadah ku kuying atu balubaluan a kuyeng. itida i macimacian a A-e-puo-te' kunyen u Pei-ci likisian nu sapakaadih nu kitidaan a nika singangan. tawya teban nu San-u kitidaan a Su-tan kunyen sakanamuhan a tataydan midang, pilipilipayan idaw tu ku miuingay atu kawaw. Se-se-tun balubaluan a kunyen u macimacian nu tapang a kilakilangan, u Pei-ci puo-u-kun a niyadu'an. Yi-li-sa-pay niwan dadan miduduc tu Su-wa nuayawan a caculilan, katuuday nu binawlan tayda namin itida tina Ke-luo-su-wa kilakilangan a kunyen miyunsuku, mingaduy atu miadih tu ayaw nu kawawan. . tademaw ‰∫∫Âè£ Su-wa yadahay nu binacadan atu yadahay nu lalangawan a tukay, tada kamu u igu, nika Pai-ci kamu, Ing-tu-se-ta kamu atu duma nu Ing-tu kamu u tada kamu nu heni. itidaay a Pei-ci tademaw atu In-tu iluc nu Pei-ci binacadan mikiyadah tu Su-wa tademaw, ina tukay u Pei-ci ku katuuday nu tademawan, pasu Luo-tu-man tademaw, Law-an tademaw, Lan-pi-ya tademaw, Kaw-cya-suo tademaw, u iluc nu O-cuo atu Han tademaw, micapi tu aydaay a mihcaan Tay-pin-yeng nu malimaday a tademaw tayni i tini, baluhay nu binacadan itini i tukay atu sin-cen niyadu'an mikuli atu maudip. . caculilan ‰∫§ÈÄö Ce-suo-li kantal pahikukian u Pai-ci a sakatusa nu tabakiay a pahukukian, itida i Su-wa a wal amis nu 23 kunli, tapang sakay milihida tu iciban nu kanatal, Su-wa atu Pai-ci a duma nu pahikukian Na-di palaliten tu pahikukian, namaka tusepcaysep mihcaan walu bulad, Pei-ci pahikukian paylipay tusa a hikukian namaka Ce-suo-li kanatal nu pahikukian mibahel pasayda i Aw-ke-lan a hikukian, nina pahikukian sibiyaw tu Tun-cya, Tu-wa-lu atu Wan-na-tu ku sapatahekal midiput. nanum han Su-wa u Pai-ci tapang a minatu, yadah ku balunga sipicukaymas nu taydaay a midang. kanatal nu balungaan atu yiw-lun musaluimeng itida i Su-wa kuowan a minatuan. .

u t…ôban nu kitidaan, tad…ômaw makaar~…æa tu **,*** ku tad…ômaw. ¶ajwar~…æpi ¶pi ¶ miƒß ¶aan , su-wa tat…ô≈ãan mar~…æa p…ôi- ¶i a suo-tu, katukuƒß i tus…ôp ¶ajpi ¶ miƒß ¶aan nipikisaan tu tad…ômawan, su-wa tad…ômaw ƒßakija makaar~…æa tu **,*** ku tad…ômawan, pasu misit…ôk…ôdaj nu inakaan a nijadu î~ °an a tabakiaj nu tukajan tad…ômaw makaar~…æa tu ***,*** a tad…ômawan. su-wa atu mar~…æar~…æitinaj a p…ôi- ¶i r~…æa-mi, na-si-nu atu ¶-suo-r~…æi a tukajan pur~…æu≈ã nu tad…ômaw ƒßakija makaar~…æa tu ***,*** nu tad…ômawan, mir~…æakuujt tu pur~…æu≈ã nu kanatar~…æ mar~…æatur~…æu nu ¶a ¶ajan a tukaj nu kijakuan. *****, f…ô pratt w. st…ôpƒß…ôns**w st…ôwart . saan ¶ajsiws…ôpsiw miƒß ¶aan a " si ¶iw ƒßur~…æi a ¶udadan" su-wa ¶ajsiw ¶ajs…ôp miƒß ¶aan maar~…æa tu sakar~…æiƒßar~…æaj nu kitidaan, katukuƒß i ¶ajsiwr~…æimtu miƒß ¶aan, su-wa pur~…æu≈ã…ôn nida ku mu î~ °-a-ni-kaw atu sa-ma-pu-r~…æa nijadu î~ °an, r~…æar~…æa î~ ° misaaƒß…ôbar~…æ katukuƒß tu ¶ajr~…æu pinƒßu≈ã-kunr~…æi, r~…æar~…æa î~ r~…æaw-ka-r~…æa-wan atu su-wa minatuan nu r~…æaadan. amis atu tipan a buju î~ °an misuajaw tu war~…æi timur~…æ nu bar~…æian, sisa tu miƒß ¶aan kapaƒß ku nikasinanuman, tukaj atu nisa≈ãaan tu r~…æuma î~ ° ajda atu nikabur~…æawan nu sa≈ãan tu r~…æamu î~ °an mir~…æ…ô ¶ad. ami ¶a ku su-wa itida i ƒßa≈ãbu≈ã nu subar~…æan r~…æikr~…æik mamin r~…æawaan nu baju î~ °, nika t…ôpar~…æ nu dadipasan u sumanaƒßaj a kir~…æakir~…æa≈ãan, mi ¶apiaj nu bajuan itida i s…ôpat a bataan kun-r~…æi nu taj-pin-j…ô≈ã minatu. . d…ôimad ** saan ku nikasasiduma nu dimiadan, su-wa u ka ¶ar~…æ…ôd…ôsan nu siudadaj a dimiadan. u puu î~ ° nu bar~…æian atu ar~…æaƒßi ¶an nu masar~…æijutaj nu bar~…æian, su-wa ¶aaj kaw u ¶…ô î~ °-taw a dimiadan. miƒßmiƒß ¶aan idaw ku nanum nu su-wa, inai î~ ° ku k…ôr~…æaƒß nu puu î~ °an, ¶aaj pisaba tu ¶a ¶aj a bur~…æadan nu nikaƒß…ôtikan tu udad nu ** ƒßawmi. su-wa nikaƒß…ôtikan nu udad makaar~…æa tu *,*** ƒßawmi. saa ¶akaj ƒßan i pituaj a bur~…æadan, nikaƒß…ôtikan tu udad *** ƒßawmi, mar~…æ…ô ¶ad tu ka ¶ar~…æ…ôd…ôsan nu d…ômiadan a tukajan, tu miƒßmiƒß ¶aan maƒßida tu ku d…ômiad nu su-wa, satar~…æakawaj makaar~…æa tu *** ¶, sasabaaj nu d…ômiadan makaar~…æa tu *** ¶. *** ¶,******** *** ¶. su-wa a nikaudadan mikikaka tu nan-ti atu wi-ti subar~…æ nitipan. sakamusa nu ajawan i≈ã-ku p…ôi- ¶i ¶u≈ãtu ¶i ja-s…ô.sin-m…ôn- ¶…ôi-s…ô sakamusa, ¶aaj ƒß…ônaj pakaadiƒß tu su-wa-na nu maƒßidaaj a udadan, ¶aaj kaƒß…ôd…ôk ku nika udadan, sabaw tu ¶a ¶aj bur~…æad katukuƒß tu r~…æima bur~…æad a nikaudadan u sajadaƒßaj, …ôn…ôm bur~…æad katukuƒß ¶a ¶aj a bataan a bur~…æad u sapi î~ °aj a bur~…æad ¶aaj ka ƒßinaudad. . a-…ô-puo-t…ô î~ ° kunj…ôn ****** su-wa jadaƒß ku kuji≈ã atu bar~…æubar~…æuan a kuj…ô≈ã. itida i ma ¶ima ¶ian a a-…ô-puo-t…ô î~ ° kunj…ôn u p…ôi- ¶i r~…æikisian nu sapakaadiƒß nu kitidaan a nika si≈ãa≈ãan. tawja t…ôban nu san-u kitidaan a su-tan kunj…ôn sakanamuƒßan a tatajdan mida≈ã, pir~…æipir~…æipajan idaw tu ku miui≈ãaj atu kawaw. s…ô-s…ô-tun bar~…æubar~…æuan a kunj…ôn u ma ¶ima ¶ian nu tapa≈ã a kir~…æakir~…æa≈ãan, u p…ôi- ¶i puo-u-kun a nijadu î~ °an. ji-r~…æi-sa-paj niwan dadan midudu ¶ tu su-wa nuajawan a ¶a ¶ur~…æir~…æan, katuudaj nu binawr~…æan tajda namin itida tina k…ô-r~…æuo-su-wa kir~…æakir~…æa≈ãan a kunj…ôn mijunsuku, mi≈ãaduj atu miadiƒß tu ajaw nu kawawan. . tad…ômaw ** su-wa jadaƒßaj nu bina ¶adan atu jadaƒßaj nu r~…æar~…æa≈ãawan a tukaj, tada kamu u igu, nika pai- ¶i kamu, i≈ã-tu-s…ô-ta kamu atu duma nu i≈ã-tu kamu u tada kamu nu ƒß…ôni. itidaaj a p…ôi- ¶i tad…ômaw atu in-tu ir~…æu ¶ nu p…ôi- ¶i bina ¶adan mikijadaƒß tu su-wa tad…ômaw, ina tukaj u p…ôi- ¶i ku katuudaj nu tad…ômawan, pasu r~…æuo-tu-man tad…ômaw, r~…æaw-an tad…ômaw, r~…æan-pi-ja tad…ômaw, kaw- ¶ja-suo tad…ômaw, u ir~…æu ¶ nu o- ¶uo atu ƒßan tad…ômaw, mi ¶api tu ajdaaj a miƒß ¶aan taj-pin-j…ô≈ã nu mar~…æimadaj a tad…ômaw tajni i tini, bar~…æuƒßaj nu bina ¶adan itini i tukaj atu sin- ¶…ôn nijadu î~ °an mikur~…æi atu maudip. . ¶a ¶ur~…æir~…æan ** ¶…ô-suo-r~…æi kantar~…æ paƒßikukian u pai- ¶i a sakatusa nu tabakiaj a paƒßukukian, itida i su-wa a war~…æ amis nu ** kunr~…æi, tapa≈ã sakaj mir~…æiƒßida tu i ¶iban nu kanatar~…æ, su-wa atu pai- ¶i a duma nu paƒßikukian na-di par~…æar~…æit…ôn tu paƒßikukian, namaka tus…ôp ¶ajs…ôp miƒß ¶aan war~…æu bur~…æad, p…ôi- ¶i paƒßikukian pajr~…æipaj tusa a ƒßikukian namaka ¶…ô-suo-r~…æi kanatar~…æ nu paƒßikukian mibaƒß…ôr~…æ pasajda i aw-k…ô-r~…æan a ƒßikukian, nina paƒßikukian sibijaw tu tun- ¶ja, tu-wa-r~…æu atu wan-na-tu ku sapataƒß…ôkar~…æ midiput. nanum ƒßan su-wa u pai- ¶i tapa≈ã a minatu, jadaƒß ku bar~…æu≈ãa sipi ¶ukajmas nu tajdaaj a mida≈ã. kanatar~…æ nu bar~…æu≈ãaan atu jiw-r~…æun musar~…æuim…ô≈ã itida i su-wa kuowan a minatuan. .
S.FORM: == Su-wa ËòáÁì¶ == Su-wa " Pei-ci kamu :Suva, kanatal a ngalnganl: ('suŒ≤a) u Pei-ci a suo-tu, u satabakiay a tukay nu Pei-ci. Su-wa itida i Wi-ti-subal a wali timulan, u teban nu kitidaan, tademaw makaala tu 77,366 ku tademaw. caywalpicpic mihcaan , Su-wa tatengan mala Pei-ci a suo-tu, katukuh i tusepcaypic mihcaan nipikisaan tu tademawan, Su-wa tademaw hakiya makaala tu 93,970 ku tademawan, pasu misitekeday nu inakaan a niyadu'an a tabakiay nu tukayan tademaw makaala tu 185,913 a tademawan. Su-wa atu malalitinay a Pei-ci La-mi, Na-si-nu atu C-suo-li a tukayan pulung nu tademaw hakiya makaala tu 330,000 nu tademawan, milakuuyt tu pulung nu kanatal malatulu nu cacayan a tademawan. ËòáÁì¶(ÊñêÊøüË™û:Suva,ÂúãÈöõÈü≥Ê®ô:('suŒ≤a)) . tawya, Su-wa u Pei-ci a cen-ce, sin-cen, sakaudip atu tatelungan nu lalangawan, micapi tu aydaay nu mihcaan madih tu ku nalimaan atu sapaadih tu katuuday ni miuingay, u Nan-tay-pin-yeng a sakaudip atu kalimulakan nu lalangawan, yadahay nu kanatalan a kusi, kanatal a kakulian atu aenengan nu tapan itida namin tina tukayan. Áï∂Ââç, . likisi Ê≠∑Âè≤ caywalnemwal mihcaan, Su-wa nuw adidi'ay henay a niyadu'an, Pa-u kuo-wan tumuk ci Say-lu.Ay-pey-ni-sa. Sa-kung-paw pahiya tu 5,000 pin-hun-kun-li a lala' sipabeli i hunbu itida i Aw-ta-li-ya a Puo-li-ni-si-ya kuse, sapaliyun tu nina kuse tu nakamuan nida tu sapatadah sa.caywalpicsipmihcaan, Pei-ci malaIng-kuo a kabulawan nu kitdaan. cawwalpicpic mihcaan kabulawan nu kitidaan pabalucu' tu suotu namaka Lei-u'-ka malimad taydan i Su-wa, Hun-cya kuncense a FE Pratt sakakaay i caywalpiclim mihcaan sipatudu' cinidaan tu pulung nu miditekay a tademaw han, itida i W. Stephen atu RW Stewart nipiedapan a misiki tu Su-wa a tukay nu kiyakuan. 1868Âπ¥, FE Pratt W. StephensÂíåRW Stewart . saan caysiwsepsiw mihcaan a " siciw huli a cudadan" Su-wa caysiwcaysep mihcaan maala tu sakalihalay nu kitidaan, katukuh i caysiwlimtu mihcaan, Su-wa pulungen nida ku Mu'-a-ni-kaw atu Sa-ma-pu-la niyadu'an, lala' misaahebal katukuh tu caylu pinhung-kunli, lala' nu kitidaan makaala tu cay pinhung-kunli. taway a mihcaan nu cacay a bataan bulad, Su-wa palatatengaay tu nipatuudan a tukayan, mala Pei-ci a sakacacay nu tukay. Su-wa itida i tusepseplu mihcaan sikawaw tu Nan-tay-ping-yeng piyunduan, uyni a nikasetsetan a kawaw nu sepat a bataan nu likisian a sakatulu nu sikawawan. mamisilud tina kawawan, Pei-ci itini i Cung-kuo sihu aniedapan tu kalisiwan makaala tu 1600 wang nu Amilika a kalisiw, miedap tu nipatideng tu baluhay a ayundean, ilabu nu tatelungan nu lumaan, ngangaduyan, kakadubaan, mammalian atu aadihan nu tademaw. ÊÝπÊìö1909Âπ¥ÁöÑ" . kitidaan Âú∞ÁêÜ Su-wa itida i Wi-ti-subal wali timu nu masadicumay a buyu' nu subalan a niyadu'an, itida i Law-ka-la-wan atu Su-wa minatuan nu laadan. amis atu tipan a buyu'an misuayaw tu wali timul nu balian, sisa tu mihcaan kapah ku nikasinanuman, tukay atu nisangaan tu luma' ayda atu nikabulawan nu sangan tu lamu'an milecad. amica ku Su-wa itida i hangbung nu subalan liklik mamin lawaan nu bayu', nika tepal nu dadipasan u sumanahay a kilakilangan, micapiay nu bayuan itida i sepat a bataan kun-li nu Tay-pin-yeng minatu. . deimad Ê∞£ÂÄô saan ku nikasasiduma nu dimiadan, Su-wa u kacaledesan nu siudaday a dimiadan. u puu' nu balian atu alahican nu masaliyutay nu balian, Su-wa caay kaw u ce'-taw a dimiadan. mihmihcaan idaw ku nanum nu Su-wa, inai' ku kelah nu puu'an, caay pisaba tu cacay a buladan nu nikahetikan tu udad nu 60 hawmi. Su-wa nikahetikan nu udad makaala tu 3,000 hawmi. saacakay han i pituay a buladan, nikahetikan tu udad 125 hawmi, malecad tu kacaledesan nu demiadan a tukayan, tu mihmihcaan mahida tu ku demiad nu Su-wa, satalakaway makaala tu 28¬∞C, sasabaay nu demiadan makaala tu 22¬∞C. 28¬∞C,Âπ≥ÂùáÊúÄ‰ΩéÊ∫´Â∫¶Á¥ÑÁÇ∫ 22¬∞C. Su-wa a nikaudadan mikikaka tu Nan-ti atu Wi-ti subal nitipan. sakamusa nu ayawan Ing-ku Pei-ci cungtu ci Ya-se.sin-men-cei-se sakamusa, caay henay pakaadih tu Su-wa-na nu mahidaay a udadan, caay kahedek ku nika udadan, sabaw tu cacay bulad katukuh tu lima bulad a nikaudadan u sayadahay, enem bulad katukuh cacay a bataan a bulad u sapi'ay a bulad caay ka hinaudad. . A-e-puo-te' kunyen ÈòøÁàæ‰ºØÁâπÂÖ¨Âúí Su-wa yadah ku kuying atu balubaluan a kuyeng. itida i macimacian a A-e-puo-te' kunyen u Pei-ci likisian nu sapakaadih nu kitidaan a nika singangan. tawya teban nu San-u kitidaan a Su-tan kunyen sakanamuhan a tataydan midang, pilipilipayan idaw tu ku miuingay atu kawaw. Se-se-tun balubaluan a kunyen u macimacian nu tapang a kilakilangan, u Pei-ci puo-u-kun a niyadu'an. Yi-li-sa-pay niwan dadan miduduc tu Su-wa nuayawan a caculilan, katuuday nu binawlan tayda namin itida tina Ke-luo-su-wa kilakilangan a kunyen miyunsuku, mingaduy atu miadih tu ayaw nu kawawan. . tademaw ‰∫∫Âè£ Su-wa yadahay nu binacadan atu yadahay nu lalangawan a tukay, tada kamu u igu, nika Pai-ci kamu, Ing-tu-se-ta kamu atu duma nu Ing-tu kamu u tada kamu nu heni. itidaay a Pei-ci tademaw atu In-tu iluc nu Pei-ci binacadan mikiyadah tu Su-wa tademaw, ina tukay u Pei-ci ku katuuday nu tademawan, pasu Luo-tu-man tademaw, Law-an tademaw, Lan-pi-ya tademaw, Kaw-cya-suo tademaw, u iluc nu O-cuo atu Han tademaw, micapi tu aydaay a mihcaan Tay-pin-yeng nu malimaday a tademaw tayni i tini, baluhay nu binacadan itini i tukay atu sin-cen niyadu'an mikuli atu maudip. . caculilan ‰∫§ÈÄö Ce-suo-li kantal pahikukian u Pai-ci a sakatusa nu tabakiay a pahukukian, itida i Su-wa a wal amis nu 23 kunli, tapang sakay milihida tu iciban nu kanatal, Su-wa atu Pai-ci a duma nu pahikukian Na-di palaliten tu pahikukian, namaka tusepcaysep mihcaan walu bulad, Pei-ci pahikukian paylipay tusa a hikukian namaka Ce-suo-li kanatal nu pahikukian mibahel pasayda i Aw-ke-lan a hikukian, nina pahikukian sibiyaw tu Tun-cya, Tu-wa-lu atu Wan-na-tu ku sapatahekal midiput. nanum han Su-wa u Pai-ci tapang a minatu, yadah ku balunga sipicukaymas nu taydaay a midang. kanatal nu balungaan atu yiw-lun musaluimeng itida i Su-wa kuowan a minatuan. .
